rationale.boundary_mode: Keep the retained 48-target package boundary for certification closeout and select the stronger production-grade operator/control-plane interpretation inside that boundary because the authoritative operator surface now uses a durable SQLite-backed external state backend with tenant-scoped records, transactional mutation/audit logs, and versioned portability artifacts.
rationale.python_support: Do not extend the certification boundary to Python 3.13 until validation and support metadata change together.
rationale.tigrcorn: Keep Tigrcorn in the retained boundary for continuity with independent peer checkpoint catalogs, but treat it as unresolved and blocking final certification.
